---
title: "The Rev. Thomas Scott"
---

## The Rev. Thomas Scott

**Dates:** (1747-1821)

### Description

Rector of Aston Sandford, and author of a biblical commentary <i>The Holy Bible, containing the Old and New Testaments, with Original Notes and Practical Observations</i> 4 vols (1788-1792)

### Biography

CMY had incorrectly stated in <i>[[cmybook:90]Pioneers and Founders]</i>, 96, that Thomas Scott was a Baptist.

### Letters

- Letter from March 11th 1878

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
